svg.aria-label: Top: a proportional-only step response settling short of target versus a PI response that reaches the target. Middle: the integral accumulator growing while error persists and leveling off. Inset: integral windup causing large overshoot versus a clamped accumulator behaving
svg.title: Top: a proportional-only step response settling short of target versus a PI response that reaches the target. Middle: the integral accumulator growing while error persists and leveling off. Inset: integral windup causing large overshoot versus a clamped accumulator behaving
svg.text: Integral control erases the steady-state offset
∫e grows while error persists, levels off at e=0
the accumulator supplies the steady command the load needs
